sections.heading: Executive Summary
sections.intro: This report presents findings from a comprehensive audit of the production API infrastructure conducted in January 2024. The audit covered 14 endpoints across 3 service boundaries.

callout.title: Critical Finding
callout.text: P99 latency on /api/search exceeded 4.2s under peak load — immediate optimization required.

sections.heading: Performance Metrics
sections.intro: Baseline measurements captured over a 7-day window using Datadog APM.

sections.heading: Root Cause Analysis
bullets: /api/search performs full-table scan on products table (12M rows, no index on search fields)
N+1 query pattern found in product category joins — 47 queries per request on average
No query result caching — identical searches re-executed on every request
Connection pool exhaustion observed at 800+ concurrent users

sections.heading: Recommendations
bullets: Add composite index on (name, category, brand) columns — estimated 10x speedup
Implement Redis cache for search results with 60s TTL
Refactor category joins using eager loading (ORM: includes/joins)
Increase connection pool from 10 to 50; add read replicas for search queries
Implement pagination limit enforcement (max 100 results per page)

callout.title: Expected Outcome
callout.text: Implementing all 5 recommendations should reduce P99 latency to under 300ms and error rate to <0.01%.
